summary: Iteration 154 testing completed for 7-step deep implementation. Fixed route conflict in vendor-capabilities API and mobile Login CTA routing. All major features working: Login CTA routes to /login, CRM 6 tabs + draggable Kanban, Catalog Taxonomy with 3 sections, Vendor Capabilities page, Inline Marketplace Filter Rail with 4-card grid, Service Page Template V2 with correct CTA routing.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not require authentication - potential security concern

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Mobile Login CTA in PublicNavbarV2.jsx was routing to /dashboard instead of /login
Fixed: Vendor capability routes had path conflict with governance routes - changed /vendors to /assignment/vendors
Note: Service pages only work for services defined in FALLBACK_SERVICES or available via /api/service-catalog/types/{slug} API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features from iteration 154 are working. Key fixes applied: (1) Mobile Login CTA now routes to /login, (2) Vendor capability API routes changed to /assignment/* to avoid conflict with governance routes. Service pages work for fallback services like office-branding, printing-promotional-materials, showroom-design, packaging-labels.

features_tested.login_cta_routing: PASS - Login CTA in public navbar goes to /login (NOT /dashboard)
features_tested.sidebar_structure: PASS - All sidebar groups present: Sales (CRM, Quotes, Customers), Operations, Finance, Catalog (with Taxonomy + Vendor Capabilities), Partnerships, Settings
features_tested.crm_6_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs working: All Leads, Service Leads, Product Leads, Request Conversions, Pipeline, Intelligence
features_tested.crm_kanban: PASS - Draggable Kanban board with 7 columns (new, contacted, qualified, proposal, negotiation, won, lost) and cards with draggable=true
features_tested.crm_drawer: PASS - Drawer opens when clicking a lead
features_tested.catalog_taxonomy: PASS - Page loads with 3 sections (Products, Promotional, Services) and group/category/subcategory columns
features_tested.vendor_capabilities: PASS - Page loads with vendor selector and capability type selector
features_tested.vendor_capabilities_api: PASS - GET /api/admin/vendor-capabilities/assignment/vendors returns vendor list, POST /api/admin/vendor-capabilities/assignment saves data
features_tested.public_marketplace_filter_rail: PASS - Inline filter rail with search, group, category, subcategory, sort dropdowns
features_tested.public_marketplace_4_card_grid: PASS - Uses xl:grid-cols-4 for 4-card desktop grid
features_tested.account_marketplace_filter_rail: PASS - Same inline filter rail in account marketplace
features_tested.no_standalone_crm_intelligence: PASS - CRM Intelligence is a tab, not standalone sidebar item
features_tested.no_standalone_service_leads: PASS - Service Leads is a tab, not standalone sidebar item
features_tested.partnerships_group: PASS - Affiliates, Referrals (coming soon), Commissions (coming soon) exist
